message:
test(bd-uo64): cover Client progress debug, IO detail preservation, and capabilities

Add 4 tests for fastmcp-client lib.rs covering ClientProgressParams
Debug output, transport_error_to_mcp IO detail preservation,
method_not_found_response method name inclusion, and default server
capabilities emptiness check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
